title: Go Fish
description: Better fish! Changes fish models to be more unique and less bland! New fishies!
body:
## Go Fish is a resource pack focused on fishies (card game not included)!

![Image that says "Go Fish"](https://i.postimg.cc/Zn8dz1tc/Go-Fish-Banner.png)
#
### <u>Mods are required for custom models.</u>
Go Fish requires either [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) for the custom cod and salmon models to work.
#
<details><summary>Click to see the full list of features</summary>

Items:
- New raw salmon & cod sprites
- New cooked salmon & cod sprites
- New slamon & cod buckets

Entities:
- New salmon & cod models

All vanilla styled!
</details>

Everything works in any version cod and salmon are found. <u>_(Ignore version warnings)_</u>.
Versions 1.13-1.21.11 have been tested

*Want to talk? Check out our Discord!*

![A minecraft cod](https://i.postimg.cc/zGjFgHMq/Cod-Cutout.png)[![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/Bt9MMcSt/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8)![A minecraft salmon](https://i.postimg.cc/dtR8bTJ7/Salmon-V2.png)


# Credit

Thanks to Ninni for the initial sketch of the cod & salmon

steg for helping make the item sprites

#

## <u>Q & A</u>

<details><summary>How did you make the fish so cool </summary>

Pure skill

</details>

<details><summary>Do you suggest EMF & ETF or Optifine?</summary>

[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) all the way. But [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) does work too.

</details>

# ARR License Exceptions

<details><summary>License Exceptions</summary>

- You may add this resource pack to modpacks, but it must NOT be modified and ideally credit is directly and clearly given in the description in the form of a link to the [source](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/go-fish) on Modrinth. (Required if not able to link in dependencies, such as not hosted on Modrinth)

- If you're using our pack in a video please add a link to it in the description if possible.

- You may NOT smell the textures.

- We reserve the right to revoke any priveleges and/or exceptions (or the like) given for any reason from a specific group or individual or in its entirety.

*Everything we have written here precedes any exceptions given inside any version of the pack itself*

*Any exceptions not written here but included inside the pack itself should be considered not applicable, now null and void.*

</details>

# 
[![Just look at the gallery already. Please. I beg of you.](https://i.postimg.cc/9Qyv50s3/Gallery.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/go-fish/gallery)

The shader used in some screenshots is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) using [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) in [Minecraft Java Edition](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
